nasb.text: Moreover, from the blue and purple and scarlet material, they made finely woven garments for ministering in the holy place as well as the holy garments which were for Aaron, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: From the blue and purple and scarlet yarns they made finely woven garments, for ministering in the Holy Place. They made the holy garments for Aaron, as the Lord had commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 他們用藍色紫色朱紅色線做彩衣，在聖所供職時穿著；又照著耶和華吩咐摩西的，為亞倫做聖衣。

ccb.text: 比撒列按照耶和华对摩西的吩咐，用蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线精工制作在圣所供职时穿的礼服，又为亚伦制作圣衣。
